zh.lifeSummary: 當Daniel Rose於1631年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州時，他的父親Robert Rose Sr37歲，母親Margery Everard38歲。他於1664年與Elizabeth Goodrich在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1711年6月16日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Daniel Rose于1631年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州时，他的父亲Robert Rose Sr37岁，母亲Margery Everard38岁。他于1664年与Elizabeth Goodrich在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1711年6月16日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德維瑟斯費爾德享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: Rose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, French, Walloon, Danish, and German: from the name of the flower, Middle English, Old French, Middle High German rose (from Latin rosa), in various applications. In part, it is a topographic name for someone who lived at a place where wild roses grew, or a topographic or habitational name referring to a house bearing the sign of the rose. It is also found, especially in Europe, as a nickname for a man with a ‘rosy’ complexion (compare 4 below). In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates and similar-sounding names from other languages, e.g. Hungarian Rózsa (see Rozsa ), Slovak Róža and Czech Roza . Compare 6 below and French Larose 2.
English: from the Middle English female personal name Rohese, Roese, later Rose, Royse (ancient Germanic Hrodohaidis, Rothaid, composed of the elements hrōd ‘fame, renown’ + haid(is) ‘kind, sort’).
English and Scottish: variant of   Ross  .

variants.name: Rosenbach
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans.
German: habitational name from any of numerous places so named (see   Rose   and   Bach  ).

variants.name: Roser
meanings: German: topographic name for someone who lived at a place where wild roses grew (see Rose 1), with the suffix -er denoting an inhabitant, or an occupational name for a rose grower, or a nickname for a lover of roses.
German (Röser): habitational name for someone from any of the places called Rös, Roes, or Rösa in Bavaria, Rhineland, and Saxony.
German (Röser): variant of Rösser (see Rosser 3).

variants.name: Roseman
meanings: English (Middlesex): from the Middle English female personal name Rosamunde (ancient Germanic Rosmund, from hros ‘horse’ + mund ‘protection’). The personal name was widely understood in the Middle Ages as Latin rosa munda ‘pure rose’ and therefore as an epithet of the Virgin Mary.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): artificial name or name adopted by the husband of a woman bearing the Yiddish personal name Royze (see Rose 9).
Americanized form of German Rosemann or Rosmann (see Rossmann ).

variants.name: Roos
meanings: Dutch (also De Roos): topographic or habitational name referring to a house distinguished by the sign of a rose, or a metonymic occupational name for someone who grew roses, from roos ‘rose’.
Dutch: from the female personal name Rosa (from Latin rosa ‘rose’).
Dutch: nickname from roos ‘erysipelas’, an infection which causes reddening of the skin and scalp, applied presumably to someone with a ruddy complexion.

variants.name: Reisen
meanings: Jewish (Ashkenazic): possibly an artificial name from northeastern Yiddish reyzn ‘roses’ (standard Yiddish royzn); see Rose 9.
German: unexplained.

variants.name: Rosado
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Luis, Juan, Carlos, Rafael, Angel, Manuel, Francisco, Ramon, Miguel, Jorge, Pedro.
Spanish: nickname for someone with a notably pink and white complexion, from Spanish rosado ‘pink’, Late Latin rosatus, a derivative of rosa (see Rose ).

variants.name: Roesel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Otto.
German (Rösel): diminutive of Rose .

variants.name: Rosette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Jose, Arturo, Cirilo, Consuelo, Cristina, Eloy, Eufrosina, Felipe, Jesus, Jorge, Manuel.

French: from a pet form of the female personal name   Rose   6 ‘rose’, or a habitational name from any of several places called (La) Rosette, e.g. in Yonne, denoting a place where roses grow. This surname is also found in the West Indies and Mauritius.
Americanized form of Norwegian   Roseth  .

variants.name: Rozsa
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Hungarian Sandor, Tibor, Zoltan, Zsuzsanna, Balint, Gabor, Gyula, Imre, Istvan, Katalin, Laszlo, Miklos.  German Armin, Erwin, Theodor.

Hungarian (Rózsa): from the female personal name Rózsa, from the vocabulary word rózsa ‘rose’. In some cases the surname might derive from an old male personal name of the same form. Compare Roja 2 and Rose 1.

variants.name: Roese
meanings: German (Röse):
variant of   Rose  .
possibly also a habitational name from a place called Rösa near Bitterfeld.

nameMeanings.name: Daniel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘God is my judge’ in Hebrew), borne by the prophet whose story is told in the Book of Daniel. He was an Israelite slave of the Assyrian king Nebuchadnezzar, who obtained great favour through his skill in interpreting dreams and the ‘writing on the wall’ at the feast held by Nebuchadnezzar's son Belshazzar. His enemies managed to get him cast into a lions' den, but he was saved by God. This was a favourite tale in the Middle Ages, often represented in miracle plays. The name has been perennially popular among English speakers since the 16th century and has been particularly favoured since the 1980s.

variants.name: Danyal
meanings: Fanciful respelling of   Daniel .

en.lifeSummary: When Daniel Rose was born in 1631, in Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Robert Rose Sr, was 37 and his mother, Margery Everard, was 38. He married Elizabeth Goodrich in 1664, in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 16 June 1711, in Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 80.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Daniel Rose è nato il nel 1631 nel Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, il suo padre, Robert Rose Sr, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Margery Everard, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Goodrich nel 1664, nel Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 16 giugno 1711, nel Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay, Brit: イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストン
ja.lifeSummary: Daniel Roseが1631年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州で生まれた時，父Robert Rose Srは37歳，母Margery Everardは38歳であった。1664年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドでElizabeth Goodrichと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1711年6月16日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードウエスエルスフィールドで80歳で死去した。

ko.Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 베더스필드
ko.Branford, New Haven, Connecticut Colony,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 브랜퍼드
ko.Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 베더스필드
ko.Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut, Bri: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 베더스필드
ko.Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay, Brit: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴
ko.lifeSummary: Daniel Rose(이)가 1631년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Rose Sr(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Everard(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1664년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 베더스필드에서 Elizabeth Goodrich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1711년 6월 16일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 베더스필드에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Daniel Rose nasceu em 1631, em Conecticute, British Colonial America, seu pai, Robert Rose Sr, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Margery Everard, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Goodrich em 1664, em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 16 de junho de 1711, em Wethersfield, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Daniel Rose родился в 1631 г. в местности Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Robert Rose Sr было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Everard, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Goodrich в 1664 г. в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 8 дочерей. Он умер 16 июня 1711 г. в местности ветирсфиелд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 80 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Daniel Rose nació en 1631, en Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Robert Rose Sr, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Margery Everard, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Goodrich en 1664, en Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 16 de junio de 1711, en Wethersfield, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 80 años.
